name: data-table
description: A sortable table over an AsyncState<T[]>: loading skeleton rows, empty/error via state-boundary, and sortable columns with aria-sort and announced sort changes. You describe columns; the table does the rest.

notes: Renders a real <table> with <caption>, scope=col headers and aria-sort on sortable columns
Sort controls are buttons; sort changes are announced via a polite live region
Loading state sets aria-busy and shows skeleton rows
Empty and error slots inherit state-boundary's roles and focus behaviour

intents: a sortable data table with loading and empty states
